## Workflow

What should the script help you do?

## Trigger

Where should it run?

- [ ] Command palette
- [ ] Item menu
- [ ] Local shortcut
- [ ] Global shortcut
- [ ] Clipboard change
- [ ] Other

## Input

What should it operate on?

- [ ] Current item
- [ ] Checked/selected items
- [ ] Search results
- [ ] Clipboard change event
- [ ] Manual input

## Expected Output

What should happen after it runs?

## Privacy Notes

Use synthetic examples only. Do not include real clipboard content, secrets, private URLs, or private logs.
